query:
ALTER TABLE recommendations 
  ADD COLUMN scale_score VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT '0' AFTER transport_score,
  ADD COLUMN rebuild_score VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT '0' AFTER scale_score,
  ADD COLUMN price_trend_score VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT '0' AFTER rebuild_score,
  ADD COLUMN jeonse_ratio_score VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT '0' AFTER price_trend_score;
